gist.headline: Watering the greenhouse
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just finished its daily rounds, checking on the health and metrics of all the community apps in our greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics and health checks in the APPS.md registry.
gist.impact: Keeps the app showcase up-to-date with the latest usage statistics and health statuses.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee flying around a digital greenhouse, checking on various code-plants (representing apps) with a tiny clipboard. A cute chunky robot with a monitor head is helping her record the metrics.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot with a tiny clipboard checking on glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby, screen glowing lime green (#ecf874) with a checkmark. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot with a tiny clipboard checking on glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby, screen glowing lime green (#ecf874) with a checkmark. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley.
